summary: Completed comprehensive re-verification testing of WhatsApp SaaS MVP Phase 1 fixes. All previously reported issues have been resolved. Frontend testing: 100% pass rate (7/7 test scenarios). All user stories (US2, US3, US4, US8, US10, US11, US14, US16) verified and working correctly.

backend_issues.notes: Backend testing skipped as per testing_type='frontend only(skip backend)'. Previous iteration_1.json reported 100% backend pass rate.

passed_tests: RE-VERIFY: Login with owner@demo.com lands on /app/dashboard WITHOUT MFA prompt (seed.py reset logic working)
RE-VERIFY: Registration with blank full_name succeeds and lands on /app/dashboard
RE-VERIFY: Connect page Launch Embedded Signup button works, 'Recently connected' panel populates
RE-VERIFY: Mock Mode badge (admin-mock-badge) visible on all viewport sizes (Desktop 1920x1080, Tablet 768x1024, Mobile 390x844)
US4 (MFA enrollment): Register new account → Security page → Enable MFA → Extract secret → Generate TOTP → Verify → Status shows 'Enabled'
US10/US11 (Send + Simulate + Auto-refresh): Login as owner@demo.com → Send message to 15551234567 → Message shows 'sent' → Simulate Delivered → Auto-refresh (4s) → Status updates to 'delivered'
US14 (Idempotency): Submit message with idempotency key → Go back → Submit again with SAME key → Only ONE message created (verified in Messages page)

detailed_findings.login_flow: ✅ FIXED - owner@demo.com now lands on /app/dashboard without MFA prompt. seed.py reset logic working correctly.
detailed_findings.registration_flow: ✅ FIXED - Registration with blank full_name field works correctly, no browser validation error.
detailed_findings.connect_page: ✅ FIXED - Launch Embedded Signup button found and working, 'Recently connected' panel populates correctly.
detailed_findings.mock_mode_badge: ✅ FIXED - Badge visible on all viewport sizes (Desktop, Tablet, Mobile) with data-testid='admin-mock-badge'.
detailed_findings.mfa_enrollment: ✅ WORKING - Complete MFA enrollment flow tested: setup → extract secret → generate TOTP → verify → status shows 'Enabled'.
detailed_findings.send_simulate_flow: ✅ WORKING - End-to-end flow: send message → status 'sent' → simulate delivered → auto-refresh (4s) → status updates to 'delivered'.
detailed_findings.idempotency: ✅ WORKING - Duplicate submissions with same idempotency key return original message, only one message created.
detailed_findings.auto_refresh: ✅ WORKING - Messages page auto-refreshes every 4 seconds as specified.
detailed_findings.toast_notifications: ✅ WORKING - Success toasts appear for registration ('Welcome to QA Tenant!') and MFA enrollment ('MFA enabled!').
